zh.lifeSummary: Philippa Harpsfield是John Harpsfield的女兒，於1471年出生在英國肯特米爾胡斯 史崔特。她於1506年之前與John Barrett在英國結婚。他們至少是1個兒子和6個女兒的父母。她去世於1526年10月16日之前在英國。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: Philippa Harpsfield是John Harpsfield的女儿，于1471年出生在英国肯特米爾胡斯 史崔特。她于1506年之前与John Barrett在英国结婚。他们至少是1个儿子和6个女儿的父母。她去世于1526年10月16日之前在英国。

nameMeanings.name: Harpsfield
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Americanized form of Jewish (Ashkenazic) Harzfeld: artificial name formed with German Harz + Feld ‘field’.
Americanized form of German and Jewish (Ashkenazic)   Herzfeld  .

variants.name: Harz
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  German Kurt, Gunther.
German and Jewish (Ashkenazic): variant of   Hartz  .

nameMeanings.name: Philippa
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: feminine form of Philip . In England during the Middle Ages the vernacular name Philip was borne by women as well as men, but female bearers were distinguished in Latin records by this form. It was not, however, used as a regular given name until the 19th century.

en.lifeSummary: Philippa Harpsfield was born in 1471, in Milkhouse Street, Kent, England as the daughter of John Harpsfield. She married John Barrett before 1506, in England. They were the parents of at least 1 son and 6 daughters. She died before 16 October 1526, in England.

fr.lifeSummary: Philippa Harpsfield est née en 1471, à Milkhouse Street, Kent, Angleterre, fille de John Harpsfield. Elle a épousé John Barrett avant 1506, à Angleterre. Ils ont eu au moins 1 fils et 6 filles. Elle est décédée avant 16 octobre 1526, à Angleterre.

de.lifeSummary: Philippa Harpsfield wurde 1471 in Milkhouse Street, Kent, England, als Tochter von John Harpsfield geboren. Sie hat vor 1506 in England John Barrett geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 1 Sohn und 6 Töchter. Sie starb vor 16. Oktober 1526 in England.

it.lifeSummary: Philippa Harpsfield è nata il nel 1471 nel Milkhouse Street, Kent, England come figlia di John Harpsfield. Lei sposato John Barrett prima del 1506, nel England. Erano genitori di almeno 1 figlio e 6 figlie. Morì prima del 16 ottobre 1526, nel England.

ja.lifeSummary: Philippa Harpsfieldは1471年にイギリスケントミルクハウゼ ストレエトでJohn Harpsfieldの娘として生まれた。1506年以前にイギリスでJohn Barrettと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも1人の息子と6人の娘の親であった。彼女は1526年10月16日以前にイギリスで死去した。

ko.lifeSummary: Philippa Harpsfield(은)는 1471년 영국 켄트 미k하스 스트릿에서 John Harpsfield의 딸로 태어났다. 그녀는 1506년 이전 영국에서 John Barrett(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 한 명의 아들과 여섯 명의 딸을 두었다. 그녀는 1526년 10월 16일 이전 영국에서 사망했다.

pt.lifeSummary: Philippa Harpsfield nasceu em 1471, em Milkhouse Street, Kent, Inglaterra filha de John Harpsfield. Ela casou-se com John Barrett antes 1506, em Inglaterra. Eles tiveram pelo menos 1 filho e 6 filhas. Ela faleceu antes 16 de outubro de 1526, em Inglaterra.

ru.lifeSummary: Philippa Harpsfield родилась в 1471 г. в местности милхоус стрит, кэнт, Англия. Её отца звали John Harpsfield. Она вышла замуж за человека по имени John Barrett перед 1506 г. в местности Англия. У них был по крайней мере 1 сын и 6 дочерей. Она умерла перед 16 октябрь 1526 г. в местности Англия.

es.lifeSummary: Philippa Harpsfield nació en 1471, en Milkhouse Street, Kent, Inglaterra como hija de John Harpsfield. Se casó con John Barrett antes de 1506, en Inglaterra. Fueron padres de por lo menos 1 hijo y 6 hijas. Murió antes de 16 de octubre de 1526, en Inglaterra.
